title: Smoky Prawn Pakora
description: Crispy fried prawn fritters with a smoky twist, perfect for a quick snack or appetizer.
instructions: 1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, crumbled paneer, and smoked paprika.
2. Add the prawns to the bowl and mix well to coat.
3. Heat about 2-3 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
4. Once the oil is hot, add a handful of the prawn mixture to the oil.
5. Flatten the mixture slightly with a spoon and fry until golden brown.
6. Repeat with the remaining prawn mixture.
7. Remove the pakora from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
8. Serve hot with a side of chutney or raita.
